user_query:
We just acquired a 2-provider general dentistry practice (1 GP + 1 hygienist). Please audit our last 30 days and design an improvement plan. Read all data from the following files and then create three artifacts under output/:

Inputs to read (all under input/):
- input/appointments.csv — appointment-level log with columns: date, patient_id, status (scheduled|completed|no_show|cancelled)
- input/production.csv — daily production by provider with columns: date, provider_id, provider_role (GP|Hygienist), production, collections, patients_seen
- input/ar_aging.csv — accounts receivable aging summary with columns: bucket (0-30|31-60|61-90|90+), amount
- input/insurance_plans.json — PPO plans with UCR vs reimbursement and plan share. Structure: [{"plan_name": "...", "patient_share_pct": 3.2, "codes": [{"code": "D0120", "ucr": 70, "reimb": 45}, ...]}]

Deliverables to write:
1) output/kpis.csv — Compute and report at minimum these KPIs with columns [kpi, value, target, assessment]:
   - Production per provider/day (report separately for GP and Hygienist)
   - Hygiene production ratio (hygiene production ÷ total production)
   - Collection rate (collections ÷ adjusted production — if no adjustments available, use collections ÷ production)
   - No-show rate (no_shows ÷ total scheduled)
   - AR >90 days (percent of total AR in 90+ bucket)
   Use industry targets where applicable (e.g., GP $2,500-$3,500/day, hygiene 25-33% of total, collection ≥98%, no-show <5%, AR >90 days <5%). Mark each KPI as on_target or needs_attention in the assessment column.

2) output/ppo_drop_candidates.json — Identify underperforming PPO plans to consider dropping or renegotiating. Include objects with keys: plan_name, reimbursement_below_65pct (boolean), codes_below_threshold (array of CDT codes where reimb <65% of UCR), patient_share_pct (number), recommendation ("drop", "renegotiate", or "monitor") with a brief reason. Use the criteria: reimbursement <65% of UCR on top codes and/or plan represents <5% of patient base.

3) output/action_plan.md — A concrete, step-by-step plan that includes:
   - A block schedule for an 8am–5pm clinic day with clearly labeled HIGH production blocks for the GP and hygiene checks, aligned to best practices
   - A no-show reduction protocol using the 48-hour, 24-hour, and 2-hour confirmation/reminder sequence and a target of <5% no-shows
   - Insurance optimization actions (e.g., pre-authorize >$500, appeal denials, AR aging cadence) and explicit PPO evaluation logic referencing the <65% of UCR threshold
   - Compliance reminders touching both OSHA and HIPAA requirements relevant to the next quarter
   - A short list of 2–3 high-value CDT codes (e.g., crowns/endodontics/prophy) to prioritize in scheduling and marketing, with brief rationale
   - 30-60-90 day milestones and owners for each initiative

Please keep everything in English and ensure the files are saved exactly at output/kpis.csv, output/ppo_drop_candidates.json, and output/action_plan.md.
